title: Full-report coverage matrix and non-tooling gap closure
description: Operator directive hcom #15008 (AFK, full autonomy): verify every finding/phase item in artifacts/reports/MAP-system-full-report-2026-07-02.md is addressed and close the non-tooling gaps. Lanes per split with codex-lab-limo (#15032): coverage matrix, reconcile_agents run + agents/status.json reality + semantics, shared/current-state.md refresh, Phase 2.4 synthesis/experiments decision + first SYN record, Onion-workbench bridging note, LangGraph runner dry-run verification.
acceptance_criteria: Every report finding F1-F9, Things-To-Add 1-7, and Phase 0-4 item has a status + evidence path or a named gap
agents/status.json reflects hcom reality; live-vs-durable semantics documented
current-state.md reflects all 2026-07-02 capabilities and passes shared-state validation
SYN/EXP decision recorded; first synthesis record is real content, not ceremony
LangGraph runner routes correctly against the post-remediation task state
objective: Prove the full report is addressed item-by-item and close the non-tooling gaps: agent-status truth, current-state freshness, emergence synthesis path, portfolio bridging, and LangGraph flow verification.
forbidden_changes: No edits to TASK-081's tooling paths (map_task.py, validate_task_graph.py, map_metrics.py)
No status.json edits that contradict a live agent's own record
No forced/ceremonial emergence records -- real content or none
expected_artifacts: runner dry-run evidence in the matrix
risk: Low: documentation and state reconciliation; only cross-repo write is one bridging note in Onion-workbench.
